description: Enhance your job search with a clean, minimalist CV & Resume template that effectively showcases your skills, education, and portfolio. This light and airy design is perfect for those seeking a career in a variety of fields, including human resources, education, and even music. With a focus on simplicity, this template allows your personal achievements to take center stage. It includes a cover letter layout to complement your CV, offering a holistic approach to job applications. Ideal for designers, this template also highlights software proficiency, making it a versatile tool for any job seeker. Its minimal aesthetic ensures your resume will stand out in a pile, reflecting your unique professional journey in an easy-to-read format.
short_description: Upgrade your job search with this clean, minimalist CV & Resume template. Perfect for showcasing skills, education, and portfolio in human resources, education, or music fields. Includes a cover letter layout. Ideal for designers and software professionals seeking a simple yet effective job application tool.

designer.description:
My name is Allison Valenzuela, I'm a Midwest based graphic designer. Born and raised in Davenport, Iowa and currently living in Moline. I graduated from the University of Iowa with a BFA in Graphic Design and a Certificate of Entrepreneurial Management in May 2015.

Taking on a creative challenge, working hard to make ideas a reality and puzzle piecing things together is what I do best. I always sport a positive and can-do attitude. I love doing freelance, so if you've got a project that you'd like to get in touch with me about, send me a message!

html_data:
Hello!

I saw your open UX Design position on your website and I wanted to reach out to express my interest for the position. I hope that I can set up a meeting with you in the coming weeks to see if I might be a good fit for the position. I've listed some of my qualifications below and my portfolio can be seen at example.com

 

Hope to speak with you soon!

 

Thank you for your time and consideration!

 

Chelsea Wolfe

123-456-7890
